Smart Recommendations AI

📈 Increase Bid Opportunity

"scentrade essential oils" has 5.8% CVR with ACOS at 17.2%, well below your 25% target. A 15% bid increase could capture +23% more impressions.

🚫 Negative KW Suggestion

"free sample essential oil" consumed $42 with 0 conversions across 3 campaigns. Adding as negative could save ~$180/month.

💰 Budget Reallocation

Campaign NBH1-SP-PB01 is 92% budget consumed at noon. 2 under-spending campaigns have $18 available. Reallocate to prevent mid-day budget cap?

Bidding Defaults
Global Target ACOS
Fallback when campaign and keyword level not set · AdvertisingGlobalConfig.target_acos
%
Default Bid Strategy
Applied to all new campaigns · Enhancement: Amazon SP API bidding parameter
Bid Floor
Minimum bid allowed (Amazon min $0.02) · Per-KW: AdvertisingKeyword.floor_bid
$
Bid Ceiling
Maximum bid cap per keyword · AdvertisingGlobalConfig.max_bid_limit (default=1.5) + per-KW: AdvertisingKeyword.ceiling_bid
$
Budget Defaults
Default Daily Budget
Per campaign, when not set at ASIN level · Enhancement: relates to AdvertisingAsinConfig.daily_budget
$
Auto Budget
Let Kepler optimize daily budgets automatically · AdvertisingGlobalConfig.auto_budget (default=False)
Minimum Budget per Campaign
System will not cut below this floor · Enhancement: relates to PacingEngineService.BudgetReservation
$
Max Budget Cut per Cycle
Budget optimizer cuts max 20% per cycle · Enhancement: relates to PacingEngineService.CampaignApplicator
%
Harvesting Rules
Minimum Clicks for Harvest
Search terms below this threshold ignored
Auto-Harvest
Automatically promote qualifying search terms
Auto-Negate
Automatically negate irrelevant terms

Mission Setup & AI Grouping
Enter your ASINs, set global defaults, then let AI auto-group them by product type and price range.
Getting started, Enter your ASINs and set global campaign defaults. AI Grouping will automatically cluster your products by type and price range for optimized campaign structures. Hover over ? icons for details.
Mission Details
ASIN Batch Input
0 ASINs entered
Enabled by default
Bulk Import Config
Upload CSV or Excel with ASIN, Target ACOS, Daily Budget, Ad Status, Competitors, Auto Pacing Status per ASIN
Campaign Structure Defaults (Kepler NB / OBH / CB convention)
Select which to generate, unchecked types will be skipped
Select which to generate, unchecked types will be skipped
Bid Strategy: Dynamic - Down Only (system default)
Budget configured per-group in Configuration stage
AI Grouping Results
Grouped by product type + price range. Drag ASINs to reassign.
No ASINs entered yet
Group + Per-ASIN Configuration
Set category-level competitors (shared) and variant-level competitors (per-ASIN) for each group. Override settings as needed.
Per-group configuration, Each AI-generated group shares category competitors (Tier 1). Add variant-specific competitors per ASIN (Tier 2). Override Target ACOS and budget at the group level if needed. Hover over ? icons for details.
Upload CSV with per-group campaign configuration
Columns: ASIN, Relevancy/Group, Match Type, Target Spec, Target Brand, Target ACOS, Daily Budget, Ad Status, Custom Negative Keywords, Auto Pacing, Auto Budget
Tier 1, Category Competitors ? (shared across group)
Auto-suggested competitors based on product type, category, and price band. Review and edit as needed.
Auto-populated
Campaign Skeleton (override defaults)
Auto Pacing
Distribute budget evenly across the day
Auto Budget
Let Kepler calculate optimal daily budgets
Tier 2, Variant-Level Competitors & Per-ASIN Overrides ?
Each ASIN inherits category competitors (Tier 1). Add variant-specific competitors below. Override Target ACOS or bid ceiling individually.
ASIN Product Name Variant Attr. Tier 2 Competitors Target ACOS% Bid Ceiling Status
← Select a group tab above to load ASINs
KW Research Approval Mode ?
Choose whether to auto-approve keyword research results or manually review them before campaign creation. When auto-approve is OFF, you can review each ASIN's keywords on the portal, make changes, then bulk-approve all ASINs in the Review Hub (Stage 4).
OFF, Manual Review
Manual Review mode: After processing, all ASINs will appear in the Review Hub where you can review keyword research results on the portal, make modifications, then approve individually or in bulk via spreadsheet export/import.
Async Parallel Processing
Keyword research and campaign building runs in the background for all ASINs simultaneously.
Processing takes 5–10 minutes per ASIN. You can safely close this page or navigate away, we'll notify you via the notification bell when all ASINs are complete. Click the notification to resume where you left off.

Smart Campaign Configuration
Review the auto-built campaign structure for each ASIN. Outliers are flagged.
Campaign Config: Review and adjust per-campaign Target ACOS, daily budget, and status. Setting Status = ENABLED creates campaigns live on Amazon when launched. Hover over ? icons for details.
SPKWManual Keyword
SPAUAuto Targeting
HPHigh Performance
HVHarvesting
SPASCompetitor ASIN Targeting
Apply to All:
View:
Campaign Skeleton — 5 strategies: MANUAL, AUTO, HP, Harvesting, ASIN_TARGETING
Bid Strategy
Dynamic, Down Only
SPKW Match Types
Exact · Phrase · Broad
Default Target ACOS
35%
Default Budget
$5.00 / campaign (HP: $10)
SPKW: {tag}-SPKW-{brandCode}-XX-S-{ASIN}-{E|P|B}-KW
SPAU: XXXXXX-SPAU-{brandCode}-XX-S-{ASIN}-{C|L|S|M}-KW
HP: HPXXXX-SPKW-{brandCode}-XX-S-{ASIN}-E-{first-keyword}
HV: XXXXXX-SPKW-{brandCode}-XX-S-{ASIN}-E-HV
SPAS: XXXXXX-SPAS-{brandCode}-XX-S-{ASIN}-X-{BrandGroup}
Type: Status: Group:
Campaign Name Type ? Match ? Targeting Spec ? KWs ? SV (Exact) ? SV (Broad) ? Relevancy ? Competition ? Sug. Bid ? Org Rank ? Target ACOS ? Budget/day ? Status ? Neg ? Opt ?
Campaign table will be populated when entering this stage.
Kepler Bid Optimization ?
Enable or disable bid optimization for all campaigns at once. Per-campaign override available in Opt column above.
OFF
Auto Pacing ?
Automatically distributes daily budget evenly across the day to avoid early exhaustion
ON
Negative Keywords ? (applied to all ASINs in this batch)
Keywords you never want to trigger ads for. These will be added as negative exact match to all campaigns.
Launch Confirmation
Review the final summary before submitting campaigns to CampaignCreationOrchestrator. Campaigns are created in batch via RabbitMQ and set to ENABLED on Amazon.
⚠ Live launch warning, Clicking "Launch All Campaigns" will submit all campaigns to CampaignCreationOrchestrator via POST /api/amazon-ads/products/save-selection/. Campaigns are created in batch via RabbitMQ (advertising_create_campaign consumer) and set to ENABLED status. They will start spending against their daily budgets once created on Amazon. Ensure all settings are correct before proceeding.

Automated Keyword Research

Kepler fetches keyword data, then uses AI to group keywords into ranked segments, each representing a unique branding scope and customers' search intent combination.

Your Keywords Optional
Add your own keywords before running research. Kepler will include them in the analysis and flag any that overlap with our research results.

Kepler fetches keyword data from Amazon search results based on your product and competitors. You can close this wizard, we'll notify you via the notification bell when research is ready.

Campaign Config

Review auto-generated campaigns. Set Target ACOS, Daily Budget, and Status per campaign. Setting Status = ENABLED creates them live on Amazon.

Review and configure your campaigns below. Each section guides you through the setup.
Setup progress:
Configuration Summary
16 campaigns · All using defaults
SPKW
8
Manual Keyword
SPAU
4
Auto Targeting
SPAS
4
Product Targeting
Click group headers below to expand/collapse campaign sections. Use "Apply to All" to set defaults quickly.
Match Type Strategy
?
Checked = ENABLED · Unchecked = PAUSED
Apply to All Campaigns
Target ACOS: %
Ad spend as % of ad revenue, typical range: 25–40%
Sets the target efficiency for all campaigns. Kepler calculates bids using: Bid = Price × ACOS × CVR. Lower = more profitable but fewer impressions. You can override per-campaign below.
Daily Budget: $
Per-campaign daily spend limit, min $5.01
Maximum Amazon will spend per day per campaign. If Auto Pacing is ON, the system distributes spend across campaigns automatically. Override per-campaign below if needed.
ASIN-Level Defaults
?
Campaigns inherit these values unless overridden at campaign level
Auto Pacing: ?
Auto Budget: ?
What Auto Pacing does:
When ON, Kepler automatically enables/disables campaigns based on daily performance targets. Campaigns may be paused mid-day if spend is ahead of pace, or re-enabled if behind. Recommended: ON for hands-off management.
What Auto Budget does:
When ON, Kepler recalculates daily budgets automatically based on keyword search volume, competition, and performance data. Manual budget overrides at campaign level are preserved. Recommended: ON for data-driven budget allocation.
Action needed: Set Target ACOS. Budget defaults to $5/day (min). Groups are collapsed, expand any to fine-tune. Use "Apply to All" above to set ACOS and budget across all campaigns.

Total daily budget across all campaigns: $152.00
Note: Setting Status = ENABLED creates campaigns live on Amazon. Status can be toggled ENABLED/PAUSED any time from the Campaigns tab.
Custom Negative Keywords ? — applied to all non-ASIN Targeting campaigns

Activate Campaigns

Enable Kepler bid optimization (master toggle or per-campaign), review your launch summary, then click Complete Setup.

Kepler Bid Optimization
Master toggle enables or disables automatic bid optimization for all campaigns at once. When ON, Kepler calculates and syncs optimal bids to Amazon daily based on your Target ACOS. When OFF, bids are still calculated but not applied, useful for reviewing recommendations before going live. You can also toggle per campaign in Step 4's Opt col.
